pattern: 2-D DP where dp[i][j] = number of playlists of length i using exactly j distinct songs, with transitions for adding a new vs. a repeated song.
hints: State (i, j): i songs played so far, j distinct songs introduced; transitions split on whether the next song is new or a repeat.
Adding a new song: multiply by (n - j) choices (all unheard songs).
Replaying an old song: there are j songs already heard, but the last k cannot be replayed, giving max(0, j - k) choices.

edge_inputs.description: n equals goal, k=1 from example
k large, forces long wait before replay

stress.description: random (n, goal, k) triples with 0 <= k < n <= goal <= 100
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, min(100, max(1, size)))
    goal = rng.randint(n, min(100, n + max(0, size - n)))
    k = rng.randint(0, n - 1)
    return [n, goal, k]
